question: How do I view my invoice?
answer: You can view your invoice by logging into your account and navigating to the Billing section under Account Settings.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and UPI payments.

question: How do I update my billing address?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Edit Billing Address and save your changes.

question: Why was my card declined?
answer: Your card may have been declined due to insufficient funds
column4: or a bank block. Please contact your bank or try another payment method.

question: Can I get a receipt for my purchase?
answer: Yes. Receipts are automatically emailed after every successful payment. You can also download them from the Billing section in your account.

question: How long does standard shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days within the country.

question: Do you offer express shipping?
answer: Yes. Express shipping is available at checkout and delivers within 1–2 business days for an additional fee.

question: How can I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships you will receive a tracking number via email. Use it on our website or the courier's site to track your package.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes. We ship to over 50 countries. International delivery typically takes 10–15 business days.

question: What happens if my package is lost?
answer: If your package is lost in transit please contact our support team within 30 days of the expected delivery date and we will investigate and reship or refund.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging.

question: How do I initiate a return?
answer: Log into your account go to Orders select the item and click Return. Follow the instructions to print a return label.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after we receive the returned item.

question: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
answer: Yes. Select Exchange instead of Return when initiating the process and choose your replacement item.

question: Are there items that cannot be returned?
answer: Digital downloads, personalized items, and perishable goods cannot be returned.

question: What warranty do your products come with?
answer: All products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship.

question: How do I register my product?
answer: Visit our website go to Product Registration enter your serial number and purchase date to register.

question: Where can I find the user manual?
answer: User manuals are available on the product page under the Downloads tab and are also included in the product box.

question: My product stopped working. What should I do?
answer: First check the troubleshooting guide in the user manual. If the issue persists contact our support team with your order number and a description of the problem.

question: Do you sell replacement parts?
answer: Yes. Replacement parts are available on our website under the Accessories section for most products.
